name: supertester
description: AI-driven software testing workflow plugin: from requirements to Playwright E2E scripts

interface.shortDescription: Structured testing workflows for requirements, cases, review, and Playwright output
interface.longDescription: Use Supertester to turn requirements into reviewable test assets with staged analysis, independent quality review, automation feasibility analysis, and Playwright scripting.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this PRD and generate test cases.
Use Supertester to review and expand test coverage for this feature.
